prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve got this. You don’t need to finish the whole thing right now—just start. Set a 10-minute timer and do the smallest first step. Momentum will do the rest. You’ve handled harder things before; this is just another rep. Progress beats perfection every time. Future you will be so glad you began. Go.
